message:
fix(combinator): track failure indices in race/join/map_reduce errors

- Update RaceAllError to include winner_index in Cancelled/Panicked variants
- Update AggregateDecision::Panicked to include first_panic_index
- Update JoinAllError::Panicked to include index
- Update MapReduceError::Panicked to include index
- Fix borrow checker errors in src/transport/mock.rs
